title: World Remains Hungry For Iron Ore
section_path: World Remains Hungry For Iron Ore
section_path_text: World Remains Hungry For Iron Ore
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Iron ore consumption has continued to fare very well both in and outside of China, as steel output has remained robust. The most recent data from China shows daily crude steel output at large and medium-sized mills averaged 2.34 million tons during June 1 - June 10. This is up by 2% from late May and is up year-on-year by 11%.
